content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.external.chatgpt
FILE: cosmos/integration/external/chatgpt.py (247 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: COSMOS ChatGPT Integration for Synaptic Swarm.

Uses OpenAI's API as a swarm participant.
Default model: gpt-4o-mini (cheapest — ~$0.15/1M input tokens).
Requires: pip install openai
API Key: OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable

CLASSES:
- ChatGPTSwarmProvider: OpenAI ChatGPT integration for swarm chat.

Uses the openai Python SDK.
Models:

  Methods: async def check_available(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def chat(self, prompt: str, system: str=None, max_tokens: int=500) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def swarm_respond(self, speaker_name: str, persona_style: str, other_bots: list, last_speaker:

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_chatgpt_provider() -> ChatGPTSwarmProvider
- async def chatgpt_swarm_respond(other_bots: list, last_speaker: str, last_content: str, chat_history: list=None, emotion
